title: Viennese Mélange: On defence, Austria charts path between neutrality and European security
summary_full: Defence minister Tanner says Vienna can be a credible defence partner without abandoning its constitutional commitment to military neutrality
summary_public: Defence minister Tanner says Vienna can be a credible defence partner without abandoning its constitutional commitment to military neutrality
